__comment__: ILLUSTRATIVE EXAMPLE of the wood-9 plan-override contract — NOT a live override. The app NEVER fetches this file (only a file literally named 'plan-override.json' dated for today fires). To test live: copy to plan-override.json and set 'date' to today's YYYY-MM-DD. Validates against plan-override.schema.md. Patch form, applied to Saturday's static curriculum day.
